title: docs: update rootless default networking mode
body:
<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

For more detailed information, please review our contributing guidelines:
https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests
-->
This PR updates the basic networking tutorial to reflect the current default rootless networking helper.

Rootless networking used to default to `slirp4netns`, but since Podman 5.0 the default mode is `pasta` (configurable via `default_rootless_network_cmd` in `containers.conf`). The tutorial still stated that `slirp4netns` is the default, which is now outdated. 
#### Checklist

Ensure you have completed the following checklist for your pull request to be reviewed:
<!-- Use [x] to mark as done, or click the checkbox after opening PR -->

- [x] Certify you wrote the patch or otherwise have the right to pass it on as an open-source patch by signing all
commits. (`git commit -s`). (If needed, use `git commit -s --amend`).  The author email must match
the sign-off email address. See [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#sign-your-prs)
for more information.
- [ ] Referenced issues using `Fixes: #00000` in commit message (not applicable; docs-only tweak without a tracked issue)
- [ ] [Tests](https://github.com/containers/podman/tree/main/test#readme) have been added/updated (docs-only change; no tests added)
- [x] [Documentation](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/docs/README.md) has been updated (basic networking tutorial now reflects pasta as the default rootless helper)
- [x] All commits pass `make validatepr` 
- [x] [Release note](https://github.com/kubernetes/community/blob/master/contributors/guide/release-notes.md) entered in the section below (user-facing docs change)

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

<!--
Write `None` if there are no user-facing changes, otherwise enter your release note below.
Include "action required" if users need to take action when upgrading.
-->

None
